reference: Hi, I have been taking Keppra for one and a half years now. I started with one gram in the morning and one gram at night. My doctor has gradually reduced the dosage to five hundred milligrams at night now. However, I have grown highly photosensitive. I see color balls in bright light and I can't find a possible explanation.
text: Hi, I have been taking Keppra for one and a half years now. I started with one gram in the morning and one gram at night. My doctor has gradually reduced the dosage to 500 milligrams at night now. However, I have grown highly photosensitive. I see color bulbs in bright light and I can't find a possible explanation.
